bug: Missing guard for (area!=0 && !interior) case. Original truth table: (0,F)=SET, (0,T)=RET, (!=0,T)=SET, (!=0,F)=RET. Reversed only guards (!area && interior). Fix: if(!!ms_nRequiredCollisionArea != m_bInterior) return;
Line 456 divides dot² by pMagSq instead of lMagSq. Formula should be |p|² - (p·l)²/|l|², reversed computes |p|² - (p·l)²/|p|². Wrong denominator.
Line 1244 misplaced parenthesis: std::abs((expr >= threshold)) applies abs to boolean instead of float. Original: fabs(componentSum) >= thickness.
depth computed with unclamped touchDist in original; reversed clamps to 0 first (line ~1516), giving smaller depth when spheres significantly overlap (dist < spB.radius).
NOTSA_UNREACHABLE where original has real implementation finding closest of 3 points to a given point.
NOTSA_UNREACHABLE where original calls ClosestPointOnLine 3 times for each triangle edge.
NOTSA_UNREACHABLE where original calls ClosestPointOnLine 3 times then Closest3.
NOTSA_UNREACHABLE where original has real implementation.
Two issues: (1) strcmp/strncmp used but original uses _stricmp/_strnicmp (case-insensitive). (2) m_nModelIdStart initialized to -1 but original uses 0x7FFF (SHRT_MAX).
Line 399: AddSplashParticles call passes vecAllPoints[i][2] and vecAllPoints[i+1][2] but original passes vecAllPoints[2][i] and vecAllPoints[2][i+1]. Array indices swapped.

Two issues: (1) Original handles EVENT_POTENTIAL_WALK_INTO_BUILDING (type 0x3c) with building+dotProduct check; reversed replaces with assert. (2) Reversed adds incorrect dotProduct <= -0.5f guard before TASK_COMPLEX_CLIMB check; original has no such guard.
Uses IsSubBike() (checks m_nVehicleSubType) instead of IsBike() (checks m_nVehicleType at offset 0x594). Wrong type check.
WEAPON_MOLOTOV case: original checks both bExplosionProof AND bFireProof; reversed only checks bFireProof. Missing bExplosionProof check.
speedSoFar += abs(abs(...)) always increases. Original conditionally adds/subtracts based on sign of (fullSpeedStep - speedSoFar). Camera buffering breaks when speed needs to decrease.
Missing m_nCurrentTweakModelIndex = camTweak.ModelID after match (asm: mov [ecx+0xd54], edx). Early-return guard never succeeds, InitCameraVehicleTweaks runs every frame.
Phase4 #59: vertAngle - atan(...) should be vertAngle + atan(...). Original: fadd then fchs = -(atan+vert). Reversed has minus, flipping atan sign ~12° error.
When m_fFadeDuration==0: uses += instead of = for alpha. FADE_OUT adds 0.0 (no-op), FADE_IN adds 255.0 (accumulates). Should be assignment.
FADE_IN case checks m_nMusicFadingDirection but original checks m_nFadeInOutFlag (offset 0xC30 vs 0xC3A). Wrong variable in switch.
Missing 3 unconditional assignments: m_bCameraJustRestored=true, m_bEnable1rstPersonCamCntrlsScript=false, m_bAllow1rstPersonWeaponsCamera=false.
Uses GetHeading()=atan2(-fwd.x,fwd.y) but original calls GetATanOfXY(fwd.x,fwd.y). Negated x argument.
m_nMinZoom and m_nMaxZoom swapped. ASM stores maxZoom param to m_nMinZoom field and vice versa.
Copies entire CCam struct into active cam via auto& instead of using separate reference to other cam.
Missing call to CMBlur::MotionBlurOpen(camera) after m_mViewMatrix.Attach.
Default case sets zoom=0.25f; original only sets flag without changing zoom for unknown modes.
Checks GetStatus()==STATUS_SIMPLE but original checks GetType()==ENTITY_TYPE_VEHICLE.
Uses PEDSTATE_ARRESTED(74) but original uses 0x3f=63 (PEDSTATE_TAXI_PASSENGER).
Default calls SetCamCollisionVarDataSet(0); original returns early without updating.
Stores targetPed into m_pExtraEntity but original stores taskHold->m_pEntityToHold (held entity).
notsa::contains checks all 2 array slots; original only checks first m_nExtraEntitiesCount entries.
Uses Magnitude() (sqrt) but original compares squared magnitude against 1e-6.
m_fMaxRoleAngle=DegreesToRadians(20.0f) but original stores DegreesToRadians(2.0f). 10x too large.
Uses TransformPoint but original calls TransformVector (no translation component).
std::max should be std::min for upper alpha clamp; uses 85deg instead of ~89.5deg.
ClipBeta always adds/subtracts 360deg instead of conditional 3-way clamp.
m_vecUp.y set to m_vecSource.y but should be cos(0.4f).
Wrong component multiplication for right/up vectors in aim calculation.
Uses CrossProduct where original uses vector addition/subtraction.
Missing m_vecSource.x assignment after ConeCastCollisionResolve. Only .y and .z written.
Missing rwRENDERSTATEZTESTENABLE=FALSE before texture/blend state setup.

CColAccelIPLEntry struct has m_nLodIndex (offset 0x00) and m_nEntityIndex (offset 0x04) swapped vs original. Disasm confirms original stores entityIndex at 0x00 and lodIndex at 0x04. Self-consistent in reversed code but cacheIPLSection applies m_bUnderwater to entity instead of LOD entity. Fix: swap field order in ColAccel.h.
Reversed calls SetCustomCarPlateText(text) but original passes nullptr (push 0 at 0x6D1119). Should clear plate text after creating texture.
Missing ApplyTurnForceToOccupantOnEntry(passenger) call. Original applies turn force in both overloads; reversed only in Auto-Seat (0x6D13A0).
When bIgnoreSpeedUpright=true, returns SquaredMagnitude() > 0.0004F but original returns true when <= 0.0004F. Comparison inverted. Confirmed: jne at 0x6D1FCE.
m_nAlarmState = ts should be m_nAlarmState -= ts. Confirmed: sub esi,eax at 0x6D2244. Alarm never counts down.
Missing null check before RegisterReference(m_pWhoDetonatedMe). Original checks m_pWhoInstalledBombOnMe != 0 first.
Missing switch case FLIGHT_MODEL_RC (2). Original routes both BARON (1) and RC (2) to same branch.
Wrong constant in z<=0 branch: uses 0.5F but original uses 0.0F (at 0x859060).
When curr >= 255 and !bFadeOut: returns 255 but original leaves value unchanged.
Uses m_nPieceTypeB (offset 0x24) but original uses m_nSurfaceTypeB (offset 0x23) for IsSand/CreatesWheelSpray. Confirmed: byte [esi+0x23] at 0x6D2D60.
Case 17 (stereo): checks RadioType != AE_RT_CIVILIAN but original checks == AE_RT_CIVILIAN. Condition inverted.
Passes &upgradeId (pointer) to RpClumpForAllAtomics but original passes upgradeId value directly. Callback compares as integer.
Shared helper sets ATOMIC_ALPHA flag but original 0x6D3700 does NOT set it. Flag only in CreateUpgradeAtomic.
Passes &frameOfUpgrade to RemoveObjectsCB but original passes pointer-to-zero.
Calls GetRope(GetRopeID()) but original calls FindRope first to convert ID to index. Should be GetRope(FindRope(GetRopeID())). Same bug in 0x6D3CF0, 0x6D3D10, 0x6D3D30.
Same FindRope bug as 0x6D3CB0. Also reversed is one-line stub but original has ~60 lines of inline logic.
RUSTLER gun offset applied inside IsZero guard only. Original applies it outside, so offset added to both dummy and hardcoded positions.
For double guns, original negates X of planeGunPosMS for second gun (mirrored). Reversed fires both from same position.
Original negates X of ordnance position for second missile. Reversed fires both from same position.
Engine braking checks brake > 500.0f but original checks m_pHandlingData->m_fMass < 500.0f. Wrong variable.
Non-bike !isRight branch: FRONT_LEFT/REAR_LEFT return values swapped vs original.
Checks IsTypePed() but original checks NOT ped. Rotor damage fires for wrong entity type.
(1) baseVel uses GetRight().y/.z but original uses GetForward() for all. Copy-paste. (2) size = v12+0.75f*0.1f should be (v12+0.75f)*0.1f.
vecParticleVelocity z set to moveSpeed.z*30 or Forward.z but original always z=0.
Else branch: reversed has extra 'if (right)' guard before DoHeadLightReflectionSingle(matrix, true). Original calls unconditionally.
Range-for over {m_pOverheatParticle, m_pFireParticle, m_pDustParticle} iterates copies. particle=nullptr is no-op. Original sets each member to 0 after DestroyFxSystem.
Inverted return: returns FindActiveTaskFromList (truthy when task found) but original returns true when neither task found.
m_nMoneyCount > 10 should be > 9 (>= 10). Off-by-one.
(1) Ammo uses * 2 but original does >> 1 (divide by 2), 4x intended. (2) Missing ClearWeapons() at end.
RadiansToDegrees(45.0f) should be DegreesToRadians(45.0f). Adds ~2578 instead of pi/4.
Returns false for PED_UNKNOWN(0) instead of PED_GAME_MISSION(3). Wrong enum value.
std::max should be std::min. Clip ammo clamped up instead of down to total.
std::min(1000.f) should be std::min(1.0f). Stat/1000 not clamped properly.
Missing m_nModelIndex = -1 (0xFFFF) before SetModelIndex. Original sets to -1 so SetModelIndex detects change.
Reads m_pEntityToHold AFTER DropEntity() which nulls it via ClearReference. Original saves pointer before. Entity never deleted.
Missing FixRadianAngle on m_fCurrentRotation before delta. Original normalizes both angles.
Loop step 3.5f should be 0.5f; inner x not reset; direction inverted. Grid completely wrong.
Missing +1.0f z offset on LOS source position.
Player/non-player look-restore times swapped (2000/4000 inverted).
Uses assert instead of RemoveGogglesModel() when goggles exist. Leaks in release.
PRO threshold >= should be > (strictly greater).
Adjusts m_fCurrentRotation by PI but should adjust m_fLookDirection by TWO_PI. Wrong variable and constant.
Uses GetLodSectorX/Y (200m, max 29) but original uses GetSectorX/Y (50m, max 119).
Return type void but original returns CObject*. DropEntity called conditionally instead of unconditionally.
Sets m_nPedState BEFORE ReleaseCoverPoint/ClearBlip. Original sets AFTER. Side-effects see wrong state.
RNG call order: checks 3% first, skipping money rand() on hit. Desyncs global RNG.
Missing fallthrough: SMG slot no match + !jetpack should fall to RemoveWeaponModel.
Wobble: checks IsPlayer() but original checks !IsPlayer(). Inverted.
DIE case ApplyMoveForce Z missing +4.0f.
bHasACamera inverted: true when rand()%4!=0 (75%) but original when ==0 (25%).
Missing m_fLookDirection=heading assignment.
(1) IsPointWithin omits bounding radius expansion. (2) outCount only incremented when outEntities non-null; original always increments.
dist <= radius should be dist < outNearestDist. Wrong variable (fixed input vs running minimum) and wrong operator (<= vs <).
SetCurrentScanCode after collision/ignore checks instead of immediately after IsScanCodeCurrent. Filtered entities unmarked, causing redundant reprocessing.
Uses non-virtual CEntity::SetModelIndexNoCreate and CEntity::CreateRwObject. Original vtable-dispatches. Derived overrides lost.
Missing negation on wind direction x,y. Original: -(WindDir+0.01). Reversed: positive.
Sets m_bStreamingDontDelete (bit 10) but original sets m_bDontCastShadowsOn (bit 16). Wrong flag.
RpGeometrySetFlags replaces all flags with 0x40. Should OR with existing.
rpATOMIC case missing geometry flags |= rpGEOMETRYMODULATEMATERIALCOLOR.
Missing m_pMovingList null check before AddToMovingList.
CRect uninitialized. Original inits to {1e6,-1e6,-1e6,1e6}.
Multiplies by CWeather::Wind (continuous) but original uses discretized threshold (0.2/0.43/0.66).
(1) Sun glare corona ID wrong. (2) FLASH_RANDOM divides by 4096 not 2048. (3) FLASH_5ON_5OFF mode always 0 due to integer division order.
Returns after first match. Original removes ALL matching escalators.
bInVehicle condition inverted. Original checks !bInVehicle. Player hidden when NOT in vehicle.
(1) Say CTX 0x94 should be 0x96. (2) RemoveAllFollowers conditional but original unconditional.
& should be | for animation flags. PLAYING & FINISH_AUTO_REMOVE = 0 (no-op). Same bug at 0x60D000.
(1) Infinite loop: GetSize() as condition, not i < GetSize(). (2) closestDist init max() vs 99999.9f.
RadiansToDegrees(30/150/210/330) should be DegreesToRadians. All four angle comparisons ~1719 instead of ~0.524 rad.
Shadow ID: entity->GetLod()+localId+3 dereferences m_pLod. Original: (uint32)entity+0x33+localId (pointer arithmetic). Null LOD causes collisions.
Water shadow: vtxIt never incremented between 4 ProcessOneVertex calls. All 4 vertices overwrite same buffer slot.
Up.z >= 0.f should be > 0.f. At exactly 0 side vector sign wrong.
std::max(frontX, -sideX) should be std::max(frontX, -sideY). Wrong variable negated.

Non-coop path missing if(unk) guard around vehicle/timer block. Original: when unk=false, jumps directly to cleanup (je 0x56EB44). Reversed runs vehicle altitude check and timer update unconditionally, may incorrectly set m_nRequireParachuteTimer=5000 and request parachute model.
m_nObjectFlags &= 0xFC040000 missing |= 0x40000 to force bCanBeAttachedToMagnet=true. Original: and eax,0xfc040000; or eax,0x40000. Reversed only ANDs, leaving bit 18 unchanged if previously clear.
DUMPER/FORKLIFT carry check: original only requires m_wMiscComponentAngle!=0 for FORKLIFT (0x212). For DUMPER (0x196) it jumps past the angle check (je 0x5A21ED). Reversed requires angle for both.

FX system creation uses TransformPoint(offset)+GetPosition(), double-adding position. Original calls Multiply3x3 (0x59c790, rotation only) then adds position once. Particle spawns at 2x object position from origin.
Same TransformPoint+GetPosition double-add bug as Explode. Original calls Multiply3x3 at 0x5A11D0 then adds position. FX offset doubled.

vecRopePoint *= TransformPoint(vecRopePoint) uses multiply-assign instead of assignment. Since vecRopePoint={0,0,height}, *= zeroes x and y components. Should be vecRopePoint = TransformPoint(vecRopePoint).

Pool iteration direction: reversed iterates forward (oldest objects first), original iterates backward from pool size (newest first). Changes which temp objects are freed when numObjects < total temporaries.

DUMPER: colAngleMult = DUMPER_COL_ANGLEMULT set unconditionally after carNodeMisc assignment. Original only sets it inside if(node != null). With null node and non-zero colAngleMult, produces wrong collision speed.
Extra m_fAircraftGoToHeading -= TWO_PI after normalization loop at line 3893. No corresponding instruction in original (fstp at 0x6A2443 stores directly after loop). Heading off by TWO_PI radians.
Sets m_fForcedOrientation = 0.0f but original stores -1.0f (mov dword [ecx+0x954], 0xBF800000). -1.0 is the 'no orientation' sentinel.

(1) Checks m_bWheelFNarrow2 (m_nHandlingFlags offset 0xD0 bit 8) but original checks m_bNoDoors (m_nModelFlags offset 0xCC bit 8). Wrong flag determines if doors set to NOTPRESENT. (2) Panel loop iterates 3 (m_panels) but original iterates 4, including m_swingingChassis as 4th bouncing panel.
Panel loop iterates 3 (m_panels) but original iterates 4 (same as Fix bug). Missing reset of m_swingingChassis treated as 4th bouncing panel.

(1) m_nGettingInFlags & flagMask condition inverted in all 3 checks — original proceeds when flag is 0 (no ped getting in). (2) Writes 0 to m_nBusDoorTimerStart instead of CTimer::GetTimeInMS() to m_nBusDoorTimerEnd. (3) Missing animated open ratio for right front door close.

Switch logic wrong: DAMSTATE_OK missing intermediate SetDoorStatus(BOOT,OPENED) call before fallthrough to OPENED_DAMAGED. DAMSTATE_DAMAGED returns immediately instead of calling SetDoorStatus(BOOT,OPENED_DAMAGED) and setting angVel=-2.0f.

Sets m_fWheelsSuspensionCompression=1.0f but original uses 0.99999f (0x3F7FFF58). 1.0 means 'wheel has no contact' throughout codebase (checks use < 1.0), so hover wheels lose contact force on water surface.

(1) BBox min Z update commented out as self-assignment; original writes colLine[0].end.z to boundBox.min.z (different memory). (2) Bounding sphere radius update (std::max of magnitude) inside if-block; original computes unconditionally.
(1) Inverted speed condition: spawns debris when speedSq<=0.0625 (slow), skips when fast. Original spawns when speedSq>0.0625. (2) FxPrtMult last param 1.0f should be 0.1f (0x3DCCCCCD at 0x6A6E93).

(1) Checks this->m_nModelIndex for GRASSHOUSE/GRASSPLANT instead of object->m_nModelIndex. Always compares harvester model, never matches. (2) Turn speed range GetRandomNumberInRange(0.12,-0.04) should be (-0.04,0.04). Original: rand*0.08-0.04.
sin(angle + 0.1f) should be sin(angle) + 0.1f. Original: fld angle; fsin; fadd 0.1. Adds 0.1 to result not argument.

Swapped lerp coefficients for m_f2ndSteerAngle when handbrake on. Reversed: lerp(old, -new, 0.9) = 0.1*old - 0.9*new. Original at 0x6ADD39: 0.9*old - 0.1*new. Rear wheel steer dramatically overshoots.
Inverted bTankExplodesCars condition. Original: proceeds when flag set (je skips when NOT set). Reversed: returns when flag set. Tank/Rhino never blows up cars in path.
DOOR_BOOT case checks m_bAltSteerOpt (m_nHandlingFlags bit 7, offset 0xD0) but original checks m_bNoswingBoot (m_nModelFlags bit 7, offset 0xCC). Wrong flag determines boot swing behavior.
BlowUpCar_Impl always passes false to FuckCarCompletely. Original BlowUpCarCutSceneNoExtras passes bNoExplosion param. Cutscene explosions don't fully damage vehicle.
Missing abs() on distance.x and distance.y before < 10.0f comparison. Original negates negative distances. Negative-side vehicles never detected.
(1) break exits inner loop instead of return true on hit. (2) Returns true unconditionally; original returns false (xor ax,ax) when no hit. Function always reports hit.

Double rear wheel exclusion compares hierarchy ID against CAR_WHEEL_LF=0 but original compares against 5 (wheel_lf_dummy). ID 0 is headlights, never matches. Left front wheel incorrectly gets double wheel on vehicles with m_bDoubleRwheels.
Uses strcmp (case-sensitive) but original uses _stricmp (case-insensitive) to compare against 'null'. 'Null', 'NULL' etc. won't match in reversed code.

ms_upgradeWheels array dimensions transposed: declared int16[15][4] (stride 4) but original uses stride 15 (imul edx,edx,0xf). Should be int16[4][15]. Affects AddWheelUpgrade, GetWheelUpgrade, and GetNumWheelUpgrades indexing.
SPEEDER water-occlusion vertices 2,3: Y-coord is -0.06F but original uses +0.06F (0x3D75C28F). Sign error on Y position.
DPadLeft condition inverted — returns when pressed instead of proceeding. Also missing check on CPad field at offset 0x44.
Unconditionally sets m_NumWakeCoords=count after loop. Original only sets it when break was triggered (dead wake point found). When all 32 points alive, original leaves m_NumWakeCoords unchanged.
(1) Decrements iVal (nWakeSkipCounterVertex) instead of nWakeSkipCounters[ind]. Wrong variable. (2) Missing else clause: when iVal > nWakeSkipCounters[ind]-1, should set nWakeSkipCounters[ind]=iVal.
Reads m_nNoOfContactWheels (offset 0x804) but original reads m_NumDriveWheelsOnGround (offset 0x805). Wrong field — off by one byte.
Ped collision loop reads from zero-initialized pedCPs[] instead of collision result pedEntityColPts[]. All ped collision points silently dropped — pedCPs never written to.
m_aRatioHistory[i] initialized to 0.0f but original stores 1.0f (0x3F800000). Suspension ratio history starts wrong.

Range-for iterates by value (auto node), so node=nullptr doesn't null the array entry. Also uses delete instead of free — original frees malloc'd track nodes with free(). Fix: use auto& node and free().

(1) trainFlags modified on this instead of iterated carriage in 4 loops: station stop (line 529-530), door close (518-519), departure (508), and derail (665). Only this gets flags, subsequent carriages skipped. (2) Buoyancy section reuses vecOldTrainPosition after ProcessBuoyancy overwrites it with force output. Speed factor and ApplyMoveForce use old position instead of buoyancy force.
Range-for iterates all 4 HeliSearchLights entries but original loops only up to NumberOfSearchLights. Renders stale/uninitialized searchlight data beyond active count.

(1) avgWheelY = fabs(a) + fabs(b) should be fabs(a + b). Original: fabs of sum, not sum of fabs. (2) Final m_wheelPosition loop iterates NUM_TRAILER_SUPPORTS(2) but original iterates 4 (mov ecx,4). Missing 2 wheel position inits.
Checks STATUS_REMOTE_CONTROLLED(8) but original checks STATUS_IS_TOWED(10) (cmp cl,0xa). Wrong enum value.
std::clamp(ratio, 0.0f, -1000.0f) has inverted bounds (UB). Original: if(ratio > -1000.0f) ratio = 0.0f. Simple conditional, not a clamp.
Support lines processing loop nested inside wheel loop (runs 4x). Original has it as separate sequential loop after wheel loop.
Uses SquaredMagnitude() (no sqrt) but original has fsqrt at 0x420B46. atan2(right.z, mag²) gives wrong roll angle. Should use Magnitude().

Initial pedType set to PED_TYPE_MISSION8(31) but original uses 0x20(32=PED_TYPE_COUNT). mov ebp,0x20 at function start. Wrong sentinel — corrupts PED_TYPE_MISSION8 entry if acquaintance line precedes first ped type name.

Inverted null check: reversed returns early when no current event (!oe), but original returns early only when event IS present AND type==EVENT_LEADER_ENTRY_EXIT. Skips all follower teleportation when no event.
pOutDistSq write guarded by if(closest) but original writes unconditionally when pointer non-null (writes initial 1.0e8 if no member found). Also uses FLT_MAX vs original 1.0e8 as initial distance.
ppOutNearestMember written only for nearest member. Original writes it for every non-null follower — final value is last member in array, not nearest. Original game bug but reversed changed behavior.
stricmp 'parachute' only checked on first partial animation association. While loop iterates remaining associations without re-checking name. Original checks every association in chain.

Missing early return-false path. Original has two independent checks: (1) event handler source==attacker AND hate/dislike → return false, (2) group event source==attacker AND hate/dislike → return false. Reversed nests them, requiring both conditions.
Loop variable i not used in GetTaskPrimary call. Always checks TASK_PRIMARY_PHYSICAL_RESPONSE (slot 1) instead of slots 1,2,3. Should be GetTaskPrimary(i).

(1) changeRoll parameter is ignored. First RtQuatRotate always uses rwCOMBINEREPLACE(0), but original passes changeRoll as combine mode: REPLACE when false, PRECONCAT when true. (2) Sets bDontAcceptIKLookAts (0x474 bit 0x400000) but original sets bUpdateMatricesRequired (0x470 bit 0x4000). Wrong flag.

(1) Extra condition difAngle<=DegreesToRadians(90) on the >45deg branch causes return (no rotation) for difAngle>90deg. Original caps resultAngle at DegreesToRadians(45) instead. (2) Torso always gets half angle (degreesHalf). When bRotateWithNeck is false, original gives torso the full RadiansToDegrees(resultAngle), not halved.

(1) BONE_R_CALF and BONE_L_CALF: max(-asin,0)*-30*slopePitch should be max(-(asin*slopePitch),0)*-30. The max(0) clamp must be applied AFTER multiplying asin by slopePitch, not before. Differs when slopePitch is negative (downhill). (2) BONE_L_FOOT: max(-asin(foot.up.z),0.0f) should be max(asin(foot.up.z),0.0f). Spurious negation — R_FOOT correctly uses positive asin, L_FOOT wrongly negates it.

(1) Missing move speed assignment from frame velocity in non-pause path. Original sets m_vecMoveSpeed from frame.m_sVelocity (offsets 0x44-0x4C). (2) Handbrake inverted when paused: original clears handbrake (& 0xdf), reversed sets it (pause || frame). (3) Steer angle zeroed when paused but original keeps frame value. (4) Missing bike check: original checks m_nVehicleType==VEHICLE_TYPE_BIKE and clears 2 bits at offset 0x614.
PlaybackIndex never updated. Original modifies PlaybackIndex (byte offset, +=0x20/-=0x20) directly in both forward and backward loops. Reversed only uses local index variable.
Spurious rec->Remove() call after CStreaming::RequestModel. Original only calls RequestModel then returns. Remove() frees data and calls RemoveModel, immediately undoing the request.
Loop starts at i=4 (smoothing from frame[3]) but original starts at byte offset 0x40 = frame index 2 (smoothing from frame[1]). Should be for (auto i = 2u; ...).
Extra condition recording.m_nNumber == i not in original. Original only checks m_pData != null && m_nRefCount == 0 without comparing number to index.
PlaybackIndex stored as element index instead of byte offset. Original loop increments by 0x20 and stores byte offset directly. Fix: PlaybackIndex[playbackId] = i * sizeof(CVehicleStateEachFrame).
Clears wrong physical flag. Original clears bit 0x04 at offset 0x40 = bDisableCollisionForce. Reversed sets bCollidable = false (different bit). Should be bDisableCollisionForce = false.

(1) Missing bPlaybackPaused check. Original only advances PlaybackRunningTime when !bPlaybackPaused[i]. Reversed always advances time. (2) Forward-seek loop: auto& next = frames[current+1] binds a stale reference. As current increments, next still points to the initial frames[current_initial+1]. Original advances both pointers each iteration.

PlayBackStreamingIndex declared as std::array<uint32, 3> but indexed by playbackId 0-15. Memory gap 0x97D670 to 0x97D6C0 = 0x50 bytes = 20 uint32s. Should be std::array<uint32, TOTAL_VEHICLE_RECORDS> (16). OOB access for playbackId >= 3.

Non-SHELTER path: second condition is wrong. Original normalizes the 2D direction (pedPos-fxPos with z=0), dots with fxFwd, checks > 0.25f (angular check). Reversed does CVector2D::DistSqr(pedPos,fxPos) >= sq(0.5f) — a distance check, completely different operation.
Search order: original checks m_ATMs (offset 0x10) first, then m_Seats (offset 0x00). Reversed checks m_Seats first, then m_ATMs. First two entries swapped.

Missing delete: original calls scalar deleting destructor (vtable+4 with arg 1) on the attractor after erasing it from the array when GetNoOfRegisteredPeds()==0. Reversed only does attractors.erase(it) — memory leak.
Same as BroadcastDeparture<T>: missing delete on attractor after erase when ped count reaches 0.
Reversed is NOTSA_UNREACHABLE but original has real implementation: frees all 10 SArray members, then iterates pool calling GetType() on each attractor and re-registering via FUN_005ee400.
Missing force=true parameter. Original passes force=1 to SetTask, but reversed uses default force=false. Script command tasks should always replace existing tasks regardless of type match.
NOTSA_UNREACHABLE where original returns TASK_SECONDARY_INVALID (0xFFFFFFFF). Original gracefully returns sentinel, reversed aborts/UB.

(1) Member enumeration: GetMembers() filters null members, so enumerate() indices don't match raw array slot positions. Original reads all 8 raw member slots by fixed offset. When members are sparse, task pairs get assigned to wrong slots. (2) ShouldSetHighestPriorityEventAsCurrent: CanBeInterruptedBySameEvent called on m_CurrentEvent but original calls it on m_HighestPriorityEvent (decompiled: vtable+0x3C on param_1[2]). (3) ProcessGroup return at line 215: reversed assigns return to m_PrimaryTaskAllocator but original discards it.

Reversed writes m_UseDir = m_QueueDir when bQueue is true, permanently corrupting m_UseDir. Original only selects a read pointer (m_QueueDir or m_UseDir) without mutating either. Fix: use const ref selection instead of assignment.
Finds in m_ArrivedPeds but should find in m_AttractPeds (offsets 0x10/0x14). Then erases from m_AttractPeds with iterator from m_ArrivedPeds (UB). Both find and erase should target m_AttractPeds.
Missing ms_tasks.push_back(task) after assigning new task. Original adds task to static ms_tasks in both found and not-found paths. Also missing null-Task guard before ms_tasks.erase in cleanup path.

Ped added to m_ArrivedPeds (line 113) but should be added to m_AttractPeds. A newly registered ped is still walking to its slot, not yet arrived. Index computation coincidentally gives same value either way.

(1) Searches m_AttractPeds but original searches m_ArrivedPeds (offsets 0x20/0x24). (2) Shuffle loop uses ComputeAttractPos(i)/heading(i)/slot i but should use i-1 (each ped moves forward one slot). (3) Erases from m_ArrivedPeds using iterator from m_AttractPeds (UB).
RandomChoiceFromList order wrong. Original: {MI_GANG_SMOKE, MI_GANG_DRINK, MODEL_INVALID}. Reversed: {MI_GANG_SMOKE, MODEL_INVALID, MI_GANG_DRINK}. Middle and last items swapped.

Reversed uses *this=obj (plain copy). Original calls AddMember for each of the 8 source members, then copies m_group and m_separationRange. The plain copy skips RegisterReference for copied member pointers — entity cleanup won't null dangling slots.

FindIdForNewMember (NOTSA helper) iterates indices 0-7 (all of m_members). Original only checks 0-6 (follower slots). If all follower slots full but leader slot empty, a follower would be placed in the leader slot.
Missing null check on member before mem->IsCreatedBy(PED_MISSION). IsLeader(null) returns false, so null members pass the leader check and dereference null. Original checks *piVar2 != 0 first.

Missing area code comparison in separation distance removal. Original checks mem->areaCode == leader->areaCode (offset 0x2f) AND distance > range. Reversed only checks distance, incorrectly removing members in different areas (e.g., interiors).
(1) Initial maxDist2DSq uses FLT_MIN but original uses 0.0f. (2) Sphere radius missing +1.05f. Original returns sqrt(maxDist2DSq)+1.05f, reversed returns sqrt(maxDist2DSq).

(1) GetLookAtEntity condition inverted: source returns when null, original returns when non-null. (2) GetTaskSecondary(TASK_SECONDARY_IK) inverted: source returns when null, original returns when non-null. Both conditions should have their ! removed. (3) lookAt.z uses m_TargetPt.z but original uses ped->GetPosition().z as the base.
Copy ctor reads m_PedToAvoid and m_TargetPt from this (uninitialized) instead of o (source). Should be o.m_PedToAvoid, o.m_TargetPt, o.m_MoveState.
Line 263-264: pedToCheck=nullptr then *insertAt=pedToCheck stores nullptr instead of the ped. Original saves ped first (iVar1), nulls source, writes iVar1 to dest. Swap the two lines.

(1) Line 112-114: early return when !m_IsMovingTarget not in original. Original only gates the gang follower update, still falls through to ComputeDetourTarget+UpdatePoint. (2) Line 123: UpdatePoint(m_TargetPt) should be UpdatePoint(m_DetourTargetPt). Decompiled passes offset 0x28 (DetourTargetPt) not 0x1C (TargetPt).

(1) TASK_SIMPLE_PAUSE: CTaskSimplePause{} defaults to 0 but original passes 100. Fix: new CTaskSimplePause{100}. (2) TASK_SIMPLE_STAND_STILL: missing m_pauseTimer = -1 reset before creating task. (3) TASK_COMPLEX_SEQUENCE: missing m_pauseTimer = -1 reset. (4) TASK_FINISHED: missing m_pauseTimer = -1 reset before returning nullptr.

Missing case TASK_SIMPLE_STAND_STILL alongside TASK_COMPLEX_SEQUENCE. Original handles both identically (bSubmergedInWater check, TryAbortAndCreate FIGHT_CTRL). Reversed only has SEQUENCE case; STAND_STILL falls to default (returns m_pSubTask), never transitioning to FIGHT_CTRL.

DoTalk lambda incorrectly swaps ped arguments in the >512 random branch. Original swaps which FUNCTION is called first (SayJacking before SayJacked) while always passing jackedPed to SayJacked and ped to SayJacking. Reversed lambda swaps which PED goes to which function, passing ped to SayJacked and jackedPed to SayJacking — wrong roles.

(1) Constants hardcoded as reqDistDeltaSq=4.0 reqTimeDelta=5000 but original computes them dynamically (defaults 9.0/10000, reduced to 4.0/5000 only under certain conditions). (2) bIsDucking ternary inverted: source uses head bone when ducking and pos+0.25 when standing. Original uses head bone when NOT ducking.

(1) Missing m_newTarget = false at function start. Original sets offset 0x34=0. Without this, ControlSubTask loops into CreateFirstSubTask forever via m_newTarget check. (2) Missing coverPos.z += 1.0f after FindCoordinatesCoverPoint. Original adds 1.0 to z before LOS check. (3) Weapon range divisor: sq(m_fTargetRange/4.0f) should be sq(m_fTargetRange/2.0f). Original multiplies range by 0.5 not 0.25.

(1) GUN_CTRL lastAttackTime threshold: 2000ms should be 2500ms (0x9C4). (2) Strafe outer condition: bStayInSamePlace polarity inverted in the strafe timer check. (3) Strafe inner close-range forward-move: bStayInSamePlace also inverted (should be !bStayInSamePlace where source has bStayInSamePlace and vice versa).

(1) targetPedWalkAnim fetched from ped->m_pRwClump instead of m_TargetPed->m_pRwClump. Both calls use wrong clump for second anim. (2) Dot product line 131 uses m_TargetPed->GetPosition() but original uses ped->GetPosition(). (3) bMoveAnimSpeedHasBeenSetByTask: both ped and target set to same bool. Original tracks two independent flags — target flag only set true when targetPedWalkAnim was non-null and modified.

(1) LEISURE case: reversed sets m_scanInterval=-1 (offset 0x14) but original sets m_seekInterval=-1 (offset 0x10). Wrong member. (2) After subtask MakeAbortable: reversed calls m_scanTimer.SetAsOutOfTime() (interval=-1) but original sets interval=0. Should use Start(0). Bug is in template base — affects all instantiations.

STAND_STILL case: reversed unconditionally returns CreateSubTask(STAND_STILL). Original checks !ped->m_pAttachedTo — if not attached calls CreateFirstSubTask(ped), only creates STAND_STILL when attached. Bug is in template base — affects all instantiations.

Boat attachment: pedToBoat = ped->GetPosition() - boatPos but original computes boatPos - pedPos. Inverted vector causes reflected attachment position and angle off by pi radians. Bug is in template base — affects all instantiations.

Wrong dummies flag in ProcessVerticalLine call: source passes dummies=true but original passes false. Ghidra: arg9=0; source line 2579: ProcessVerticalLine(..., true, false, false, false, true, ...) — the 5th bool (dummies) should be false.

Wrong m_nBehaviourType constant: source checks == 4u (line 186) but original binary checks == 0. ASM at 0x44D371: test dl,dl; jbe 0x44D37A — qualifies if dl==0. Should be: linked.m_nBehaviourType == 0u || linked.m_nBehaviourType > 10u.

Line 365: std::max should be std::min for m_NumGenerationsAllowed when merging fires. Binary: if (this->gens < nearby.gens) { bVar4 = this->gens; } this->gens = bVar4; — assigns min(this,nearby). Source assigns max.

CRect::IsPointInside uses >= fXMin and <= fXMax (inclusive), but binary excludes boundary: fXMin < x (strict >) and x < fXMax (strict <). Same bug for Y axis. Raw disasm: fcom+test ah,0x41+jne skips x<=fXMin; fcomp+test ah,5+jp skips x>=fXMax.
Wrong comparison operator: >= should be > when checking highestZ against -99.0f (MAP_Z_LOW_LIMIT+1.0f). Original returns false at exact equality.
Missing null-matrix fallback for target.GetForward(). When m_matrix==null, original derives forward from m_fHeading as {-sin(h),cos(h)}. Reversed crashes.

ENTITY_TYPE_BUILDING case has fabricated m_bTunnel/m_bTunnelTransition assignments not in binary. Missing actual bitmask flag-copy ops (& 0x40000000, & 0x7fffffff). Same bug likely in CAutomobile::ProcessEntityCollision at 0x6ACE70.

While-loop missing _stricmp check: source checks only the first partial animation association for 'parachute' name, then loops through the rest without checking. Binary iterates all partial anim associations and returns true if ANY matches 'parachute'. Fix: move _stricmp inside loop or restructure as for-loop iterating all associations.

Bug in event/acquaintance check: binary checks target's acquaintances (hate/dislike vs m_pPed's pedType) BEFORE the group check and returns false immediately if event.source==m_pPed AND (hate|dislike) match — no group needed. Source incorrectly nests the acquaintance check inside group+group-event condition (bAcquaintancesFlagSet && GetGroup() && ...), so when event.source matches and target hates m_pPed but there's no group, source returns true (stealth kill allowed) while binary returns false. Fix: move acquaintance check before the group block.

Line 994: score <= scoreOfClosest should be score < scoreOfClosest. Original asm (fcom+test ah,5+jp) is strictly less-than. Effect: when score equals current best, reversed replaces the match, original keeps the first.

(1) Missing guard: original checks leader!=&ped (cmp eax,edi; je at 0x622493) and skips if leader IS the ped. Reversed code enters lambda body unconditionally. (2) Wrong recursive arg: original push eax (=leader) at 0x6224B2 but reversed calls ComputeNearestLivingGroupPed(ped,true) instead of (*leader,true).

(1) Uses 3D SquaredMagnitude but original computes 2D sqrt(dx²+dy²), ignoring Z param. Position.z is passed but never used for distance. (2) Comparison uses <= but original fcomp+test ah,5+jnp is strictly <.

randomSeed%16 and randomSeed/16 should be randomSeed&0xF and (randomSeed>>4)&0xF (arithmetic right shift). For negative randomSeed: -1%16=-1 but -1&0xF=15; -1/16=0 but -1>>4=-1(then &0xF=15). Result coordinates diverge.

(1) flyObj.moveSpeed should be SET to (ped.moveSpeed ± car.right*0.1 + car.up*0.5), not ADDED to flyObj's existing speed. Original reads ped param at +0x44. (2) Coin flip only negates the right*0.1 component; up*0.5 is always positive. Reversed negates both via dir/-dir.

Ped type range off-by-one: original checks pedType>=7 (jl) && pedType<=16 (jle), including GANG1(7) and GANG10(16). Reversed uses pedType<=PED_TYPE_GANG1 || pedType>=PED_TYPE_GANG10, which EXCLUDES both endpoints. Fix: use < and >.

lineDir = aimingDir * 250.f is computed (0x859f80=250.0 confirmed) but never used. DistToLine called with (origin, origin+aimingDir) instead of (origin, origin+lineDir). The line segment is 250× too short, causing incorrect distance-to-line scoring for all targets.

Same-type branch: when this->ped is player, original returns true if refEvent.ped is NULL or not player (sete on IsPlayer result). Reversed uses && (requires non-null AND not-player), should be || (!refEvent.ped || !IsPlayer). Null refEvent.ped: original=true, reversed=false.

Final return inverted: original returns !IsMember (asm: jne to xor al,al when IsMember true, fall through to mov al,1 when false). Reversed returns IsMember directly. Fix: return !FindPlayerPed()->GetPlayerGroup().GetMembership().IsMember(m_AcquaintancePed).

Wrong guard condition. Original: when m_IsOccupantLeavingCar already set, skips task lookup but still checks m_vehicle/ped->m_pVehicle (jne past task block to vehicle check). Reversed: !m_IsOccupantLeavingCar guard skips entire block and returns false. Fix: restructure to check vehicle after flag-already-set path.
Infinite recursion when ped==null. Original inlines CEvent::IsValid (checks m_bValid and timeActive vs GetLifeTime). Reversed calls IsValid(ped) recursively. Fix: call CEvent::IsValid(ped) instead.

When vehicle is neither IsAutomobile() nor bIsBig, original returns vehHit directly (0x616B26: mov eax,esi; ret). Reversed returns nullptr. Affects bikes, boats, etc. — incorrectly reports position as clear.

Wrong pellet spread range: original GetRandomNumberInRange(depth*0.2f, depth) gives [20%,100%] donut spread; reversed GetRandomNumberInRange(0.f, depth*0.8f) gives [0%,80%] allowing center hits. Constants at 0x858cc4=0.2f confirm min offset.

Inverted fire status condition: original 'cmp [status],0; jne return_false' returns false when status!=0 (position on cooldown). Reversed checks 'status==0' returning false when status IS zero (position ready). Completely inverted — fire can only start at cooling positions, never at fresh ones.

First fire (i=0) should use exact explosion center — original 'test ebx,ebx; je skip_offset' skips random offset for i==0, but reversed applies GetRandomNumberInRange(-4,4) to ALL fires. (Note: the pointFire param diff is harmless — StartFire at 0x539F00 ignores that parameter.)

Inverted CanSeeEntity condition in entity filter loop. Original: 'call CanSeeEntity; test al,al; je skip' skips entities the owner CANNOT see (processes visible ones for auto-aim). Reversed: 'if (CanSeeEntity) continue' skips entities the owner CAN see — auto-aim targets only invisible entities, completely broken.

Swapped SetCarsOnFire/SetWorldOnFire in MOLOTOV case. Original (verified at 0x73794C-0x73796E): SetPedsOnFire(6.0), SetCarsOnFire(6.0), SetWorldOnFire(0.1). Reversed swaps last two: SetWorldOnFire(6.0), SetCarsOnFire(0.1). Molotov barely ignites cars (0.1 radius) but creates huge world fire (6.0 radius).

Inverted bInvulnerable condition. Original at 0x5657A7: 'test edx,0x400000; je StartFire' jumps to StartFire when NOT invulnerable. Reversed uses 'if (bInvulnerable)' which starts fire when IS invulnerable. Effect: invulnerable peds always catch fire (even from NPCs), normal peds are protected from NPC fires — completely backwards.

Wrong fire-starting probability for FLAMETHROWER. Original at 0x73EB61: 'and al,3; cmp al,2' gives exactly 25% (1/4) chance. Reversed uses RandomBool(100.f/3.f) ≈ 33.3% (1/3). Flamethrower creates creeping fires ~33% more often than intended.

RAMMEDBYCAR/RUNOVERBYCAR direction 0: wrong piece type check. Original at 0x4B3DEC: 'cmp eax,6; setne cl; dec ecx; and ecx,0xfffffffd; add ecx,0x1a' checks for RIGHT_ARM(6)→KD_RIGHT, else→KO_SKID_BACK. Reversed uses 'm_pedPieceType ? KO_SKID_BACK : KD_RIGHT' which gives KD_RIGHT for piece 0 (TORSO) instead of piece 6 (RIGHT_ARM). Swaps animations for torso/right-arm hits.

Three bugs in first-person fire: (1) Target position missing 'wi->m_fWeaponRange' multiplier — original at 0x741CE5 multiplies front*3.0 by range, C++ just uses front*3.0 (ray is ~100x too short). (2) Range check at 0x741DEC uses fsqrt (Magnitude2D) but C++ uses SquaredMagnitude2D. (3) Range check condition inverted — original clears entity when range<dist (out of range), C++ clears when range>=sqDist (in range).
Spurious AdvanceCurrentScanCode() call at line 3063. Original has no such call — function uses repeat sectors (no scan code dedup needed). Needlessly increments ms_nCurrentScanCode.
collForceMult=1.f when damageIntensity!=0 (line 2897) but original keeps 0.333f. Makes dmgDrawCarCollidingParticles and calcCollHealthLoss 3x too large.
WING_LF comparisons inverted: localDir > -0.7f / > -0.5f should be < -0.7f / < -0.5f (lines 3019-3020). WING_LF damage applied far too often.
Crash speech (line 3135): compares m_pDamageEntity vs FindPlayerVehicle() instead of this; also IsMissionVehicle() should be !IsMissionVehicle(). Suppresses speech under wrong conditions.

STATUS_REMOTE_CONTROLLED/bSubmergedInWater control flow (lines 2828-2839): original returns unconditionally for RC, then checks submerged for ALL remaining statuses. Reversed only checks submerged inside RC case. Submerged non-RC vehicles incorrectly lose health.
m_Strength update condition inverted (lines 251-253). Original stores new value then reverts if integer parts differ. Reversed only updates when they differ — opposite logic.
SetConstTime formula (line 374): uses CTimer::GetTimeInMS() instead of (m_TimeToBurn - CTimer::GetTimeInMS()). Wrong remaining-time calculation.
Fire merge (line 361): stores blended position into nearby.m_Position instead of this->m_Position. Wrong fire gets repositioned.
Missing m_NumGenerationsAllowed-1 (line 353): passes m_NumGenerationsAllowed to CCreepingFire without decrementing. Original does dec cl.
Wrong nGens for non-BMX vehicle fire (line 336): passes nGens=100 instead of 0. Original pushes 0.
Missing vehicle conditions in pool loop (lines 327-329): missing vehicle->m_pFire==nullptr and !IsFireTruck checks. Sets already-burning and fire truck vehicles on fire.
IsNotInRemovalDistance (line 396): uses 3D Magnitude() but original uses only X/Y components (2D distance).
FxPrtMult for RC+STATUS_REMOTE_CONTROLLED (line 4922): 0.5 placed in blue instead of alpha. Should be {0,0,0,0.5,...} not {0,0,0.5,0.4,...}.
FxPrtMult for RC+non-RC status (line 4924): 0.15 placed in blue instead of alpha. Should be {0,0,0,0.15,...} not {0,0,0.15,0.4,...}.
m_fireParticleCounter (line 4911): uses truthiness (!=0, always true) instead of ==1. Airborne slow-burn path (floorTsMS/5) never taken.
Missing CreateFx for non-plane/heli (line 4973): when partFxToUse!=0, falls to cleanup instead of creating fire_car FX. Structural goto mismatch.
Missing BlowUpCar for bExplodeImmediately+plane/heli (line 4902): entire plane/heli logic wrapped in if(!bExplodeImmediately), so BlowUpCar never called when immediate.
PLAY_ON_HIT FX case (lines 1131-1135): missing !bWasDestroyed guard. Original only allows PLAY_ON_HIT when not destroyed. Reversed creates hit FX even when object was destroyed.

RAMMEDBYCAR/RUNOVERBYCAR direction 0: source uses `m_pedPieceType ? KO_SKID_BACK : KD_RIGHT` (truthiness check) but original checks `m_pedPieceType == PED_PIECE_RIGHT_ARM` to select KD_RIGHT, else KO_SKID_BACK. Same pattern as direction 2 (line 554) which correctly uses == PED_PIECE_RIGHT_ARM. Fix line 543: `m_nAnimID = (m_pedPieceType == PED_PIECE_RIGHT_ARM) ? ANIM_ID_KD_RIGHT : ANIM_ID_KO_SKID_BACK;`
Always returns nullptr; original returns fire pointer on success. Fix: return fire inside the if(GetNextFreeFire) block.
Missing null check on creator before CCrime::ReportCrime in Fire::Start ped/vehicle cases. Original checks creator!=null at 0x53A112 and 0x53A141.

Missing 7 flag clears in m_nPlayerFlags. Original does AND 0xFFFFF7B0 | 0x1010 (clears bits 0,1,2,3,6,11; sets 4,12) then AND 0xFFFFFF7F (clears bit 7). Reversed only sets m_bCanBeDamaged(4) and m_bRenderWeapon(12). Missing clears: m_bStoppedMoving(0), m_bAdrenaline(1), m_bHaveTargetSelected(2), m_bFreeAiming(3), m_bJustBeenSnacking(6), m_bRequireHandleBreath(7), m_bInVehicleDontAllowWeaponChange(11).

Wrong function: calls RegisterReference (adds ref) instead of CleanUpOldReference (removes ref). Also assert(criminal) should be if(!criminal)return — original has null guard, not assert. Compare with ClearCriminalsToKill which correctly uses ClearReference.
Inverted condition: bEngineOn = bEngineBroken should be bEngineOn = !bEngineBroken. Original: if engine NOT broken, turn ON; if broken, turn OFF. Reversed does the opposite.

Wrong function: calls GetAngleBetweenPoints (0x53CEA0, returns degrees) instead of GetRadianAngleBetweenPoints (0x53CBE0, returns radians). Result fed to LimitRadianAngle and m_fAimingRotation which expect radians.

Timer restart m_posCheckTimer.Start() is outside the position-change check. Original restarts timer only when entity moved beyond m_posChangeTolerance. Reversed restarts every time timer expires. Effect: checks position only once per m_posCheckPeriod instead of every frame after first expiry until entity moves. Fix: move m_posCheckTimer.Start(m_posCheckPeriod) inside the if(SquaredMagnitude >= sq(tolerance)) block.

Wrong ambient color: RwRGBAReal{255, 255, 255, 1.0f} should be {0.65f, 0.65f, 0.65f, 1.0f}. Original uses IEEE754 0x3F266666 for R,G,B = 0.65f. RwRGBAReal uses normalized 0.0-1.0 floats, not 0-255 integers. Results in massively overblown lighting on skin edit screen.

Two bugs: (1) Say condition `!m_bHealthZero || m_bAddedDamageEvent` should be `!m_bHealthZero || !m_bAddedDamageEvent`. Current code skips scream on the frame ped dies (healthZero=T, addedEvent=F) and adds spurious scream after death (healthZero=T, addedEvent=T). (2) Missing `m_bAddedDamageEvent = true` after adding CEventDamage (Ghidra line 76: *(param_1+0x14)=1). Without it, damage event is added every frame instead of once, and the `if(m_bAddedDamageEvent) return true` guard never triggers.
